# contentful_locale (List Resource)

List Contentful Locales.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "contentful_locale" "locales" {
  provider = contentful

  config {
    space_id       = var.contentful_space_id
    environment_id = var.contentful_environment_id
  }

  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) The ID of the environment for which to list locales.
- `space_id` (String) The ID of the space for which to list locales.

### Optional

- `order` (List of String) Order locales by one or more attributes.
